productDisplayName: Satya Paul Women Orange & Brown Kurti
description: Style NoteFrom the design house of satya paul, this fiery piece captures the bohemian  travelling spirit in you. With bright jewel toned colouring, we love that this is simplistically styled and yet, it casts an ocean nymph-like, flowy silhouette. Style it with leggings for a dressy vibe.Product DetailsSleeveless rust red and orange round neck kurti, has metallic embellishments along the neckline, two pleats at the bust, two inverted flaring box pleats at the midriff and a slightly flaring skirt. Comes with flesh coloured lining.Material and CareSyntheticDry cleanSizeRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
